inscription: Nash Stanewood the 22nd's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Sepulcher of Quill Yardun the 14th
inscription: Quill Yardun the 14th is recorded among the dead of Ilton.

name: Tomb of Orin Arridge the 19th
inscription: Orin Arridge the 19th is recorded among the dead of Ilton.
